title: Nightlancer
description: Adds an ominous boss on horseback
body:
The Nightlancer is a boss summoned by shearing a pumpkin at night while under the effect of Bad Omen. Upon defeat, the player can take control of its horse and use its Ancient Lance, a weapon that is most effective on horseback.
